const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73452191 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73452191 | sort && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73452191 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files -uu | rg '(^|/)(record|snapshots?)/|73452191|context\\.json$|documents\\.json$' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/questions-pres

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '180,420p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '421,680p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '681,940p' data/cases/scotus/73452191/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n '^#|Modern discretionary-cert|relist|CVSG|Third Circuit|3d Cir|salience|Salience|fee|Paid|Term' metrics/statpack.md | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,175p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'salience|segment|band|third|ca3|paid|2025' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == 2025 or .term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq -r '.sections[].title // .sections[].name // .sections[].id // (.sections[] | keys | join(\",\"))' metrics/statpack.json 2>/dev/null | head -n 80 && jq '.sections | length' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts open-events --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(hits);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Lo-Ji Sales\" \"judicial immunity\" arrest judge",court:["ca3","ca4","ca5","ca6","ca8"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","docketNumber","absolute_url","status","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --era 2020s --limit 10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Lo-Ji Sales\" \"judicial immunity\" arrest",court:["ca3","ca4","ca5","ca6","ca8"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","docketNumber","absolute_url","status","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;
